create.prompt:
Use case: social ad shot 1 of 6
Primary request: Minimal abstract opening where floating geometric data cards drift in from all sides and assemble into one clean dashboard grid.
Scene/background: neutral digital studio gradient, no people
Subject: translucent rectangles, simple chart glyphs, interface blocks
Action: beat 1: cards drift in; beat 2: cards align into a tidy layout; beat 3: layout holds center frame
Camera: slow push-in, steady
Lighting/mood: crisp and professional
Color palette: navy, slate, white, cyan
Style/format: premium abstract tech ad
Constraints: all-ages safe, no real people, no logos, no copyrighted characters
Avoid: weapons, violence, injury, panic
